statements.notes: Calm mind
Dietary Supplement
Suggested Use: 1 lozenge, up to 3 times daily. Place the lozenge in various positions inside the mouth including under the tongue and allow to dissolve slowly.
Do not use if either tamper-evident seal is broken or missing.
Keep out of the reach of children.

Gaba Calm combines two of the main inhibitory neurotransmitters, GABA and glycine, with N-acetyl L-tyrosine, which is a precursor to the neurotransmitters dopamine and norepinephrine. In addition, taurine supports the calming effects of GABA.
The lozenge form dissolves in the mouth for quick and convenient delivery.
Warning: Contains tyrosine.

statements.notes: Helps Promote Sleep
Dietary Supplement
Non GMO Validated
Non GMO Validated

Source Naturals Melatonin Complex is a soothing nighttime formula, which combines the neurohormone melatonin with GABA glycine, and taurine to help support the levels of these key amino acids that can act as inhibitory neurotransmitters. Coenzymated vitamin B-6, the active form of vitamin B-6, is included to support healthy levels of neurotransmitter production in the brain.
Suggested Use: 1 lozenge at bedtime. For best results, allow to dissolve in the mouth before swallowing.
Warning: Use only at bedtime.

For adult use only.
Not for use by children, teenagers, or women are pregnant, may become pregnant, or breastfeeding.

statements.notes: Dietary Supplement
Warning: Not for use by individuals under the age of 18 years.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant, may become pregnant, or breastfeeding. Consult a physician or licensed qualified healthcare professional before using this product if you have, or have a family history of, prostate cancer, prostate enlargement, heart disease, low "good" cholesterol (HDL), or if you are using any other dietary supplement, prescription drug, or over-the-counter drug.

Do not exceed recommended serving. Exceeding recommended serving size may cause serious adverse health effects. Possible side effects include acne, hair loss, hair growth on the face (in women), aggressiveness, irritability, and increased levels of estrogen. Discontinue use and call a physician or licensed qualified health care professional immediately if you experience rapid heartbeat, dizziness, blurred vision, or other similar symptoms.

Directions: 1 lozenge 1 to 2 times daily. Start with one lozenge per day (one-half lozenge may be sufficient for some persons) and gradually increase to 2 lozenges over several days, as desired. Do not exceed 50 mg daily. Do not take more than 30 days.

Have your blood hormone (estrogen, testosterone, DHEA) levels regularly assessed by your physician. Using pregnenolone may elevate your DHEA levels, and DHEA can increase estrogen and testosterone levels. Read entire label before using.
Do not use if tamper-evident seal is broken or missing.
Keep out of the reach of children.
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Copyright Source Naturals, INC.

labelText.raw: Contains no salt, dairy, yeast, wheat, gluten, corn, soy, preservatives, artificial colors or flavors. Helps support nervous system and cardiovascular health
Dietary Supplement

Methylfolate (5-MTHF) is the most biologically active form of folate in the human body. Unlike folic acid, it needs no enzymatic conversion within the body, and is therefore six times more bioavailable.

Many people suffer from a genetic disorder that prevents them from adequately converting folate into 5-MTHF. Since it does not require conversion, supplemental 5-MTHF quickly increases both blood and cellular levels of this critical nutrient.
In addition to its well-known role in supporting healthy fetal neural development, 5-MTHF is important in the synthesis of acetylcholine, an important neurotransmitter. 5-MTHF also supports a healthy cardiovascular system by helping to keep homocysteine levels within the normal range.
Homocysteine is a known risk factor for cardiovascular disease.
Quatrefolic is a registered trademark of Gnosis S.p.A.

Suggested use: 1 lozenge at bedtime. For best results, allow to dissolve in the mouth before swallowing.
Do not use if either tamper-evident seal is broken or missing.

Sleep Science Melatonin Complex is a soothing nighttime formula, which combines the neurohormone melatonin with GABA, glycine, and taurine, to help support the levels of these key amino acids that can act as inhibitory neurotransmitters. Coenzymated vitamin B-6, the active form of vitamin B-6, is included to support healthy levels of neurotransmitter production in the brain.
Warning: use only at bedtime.
For adult use only. Not for use by children, teenagers, or women who are pregnant, may become pregnant, or breastfeeding.

statements.notes: Tasty peppermint lozenge for occasional sleep support

As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body's natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies occasional lack of sleep. Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing . This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol and sorbitol, two low calorie sweeteners.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant or nursing.
Not intended for use by children under age 18.

Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.
Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a healthcare practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this product.
Store in a cool, dry place.
We guarantee our supplements for potency and purity

statements.notes: Support energy, healthy hair, skin & nails with Biotin 2,500 mcg Rapid Melting Lozenge

Biotin, a B vitamin long used to aid in metabolism and support healthy hair, skin and nails, has recently been discovered to be beneficial for blood glucose already within normal range. Additionally, Biotin supports energy, and is necessary for processing protein, fats, and carbohydrates. Like other B vitamins, Biotin is a water-soluble nutrient, requiring daily replenishment. Our tasty, natural berry flavored rapid melting lozenge offer a quick delivery of 2,500 mcg of Biotin to support your daily needs.
Contains no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives; no wheat, gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, sesame, tree nuts, soy, crustacean shellfish or fish.

statements.notes: As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body's natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies chronic lack of sleep. Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing. This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol (from birch tree) and sorbitol, two low calorie and natural sweeteners.

Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.
Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a health care practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this product.

TrueOC contains dairy-free BLIS K12 and BLIS M18 which are two strains of the naturally occurring probiotic organism Streptococcus salivarius. Orange flavor.
When taken regularly, these specific probiotic stains may help support several aspects of tooth and gum health and protect against the overgrowth of bacteria that causes bad breath. In addition, BLIS K12 and BLIS M18 help support upper respiratory, ear and throat health.
ACTIValoe aloe vera provides additional support for tooth and gum health.

Slippery Elm (Ulmas rubra) is a tree native to North America. The inner bark has been used for generations to soothe minor throat irritation associated with exposure to dust, excessive talking and other everyday activities. These Planetary Herbals Slippery Elm Lozenges are tangerine flavored for great taste.

fullName: Natural Peppermint Flavor Melatonin 1 mg Lozenge

userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

contacts.text: To report a serious adverse event, call

statements.notes: As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body's natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies chronic lack of sleep. Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing.
Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant or nursing.

Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a health care practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this product.
Not intended for use by children under age 18.
We guarantee our supplements for potency and purity
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Promotes rest and relaxation
Dietary Supplement
Double Verified Gluten Free
Suggested Use: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge on an empty stomach 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime.
Contains no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives; no wheat, gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, crustacean shellfish or fish.
Keep out of reach of children.
This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol (from birch tree) and sorbitol, two low calorie and natural sweeteners.

Calm mind
Dietary Supplement
Suggested Use: 1 lozenge, up to 3 times daily. For best results, allow to dissolve in the mouth before swallowing.

statements.notes: Dietary Supplement
Athletic series
Coenzymated B-12
The benefits of coenzymated vitamins
Coenzymated B-12 is ready to go to work immediately.

Dibencozide is another name for adenosylcobalamin, a primary coenzyme form of vitamin B-12 essential for processing branched chain amino acids for energy production in the mitochondria.  Vitamin B-12 is also necessary for the production of red blood cells that deliver oxygen to tissues for energy production.  Supplementation with vitamin B-12 can help ensure optimal energy production during prolonged exertion.  Coenzyme supplementation reduces the body’s need to synthesize the active forms of vitamin B-12, unlike the commonly used cyanocobalamin, which the body must convert to the coenzyme forms.
Suggested Use: 1 lozenge daily between meals or 30 minutes before workouts. For best results, allow to dissolve in the mouth before swallowing.

statements.notes: Dietary Supplement
P-5'-P (Pyridoxal-5'-phosphate)
Supports amino acid metabolism
The benefits of coenzymated vitamins
In order for vitamins to be utilized by the body, they must first be converted into their active coenzyme forms.
This Coenzymated B-6 goes directly into your bloodstream in its active form, ready to go to work immediately.

This avoids the loss that may occur not only during digestion, but during the liver’s conversion process as well. Pyridoxal-5´-Phosphate (PLP or P-5´-P) is the main metabolically active coenzyme form of vitamin B-6. It is primarily in the liver that P-5´-P is synthesized from pyridoxine, with the help of enzymes that require B-2, zinc and magnesium for their activity. P-5´-P is associated with numerous enzymes, many of which are involved in the conversion of amino acids into the neurotransmitters dopamine, norepinephrine and serotonin. P-5’-P is also required for the synthesis of the hemoglobin molecule.
Suggested Use: 1 lozenge daily. For best results, allow to dissolve in the mouth before swallowing.

statements.notes:
SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take 1 lozenge 1 to 2 times daily. Chew lozenge, or allow lozenge to dissolve in mouth completely and swallow. Consider taking
these other NOW(R) products: Arginine Power Super Stack, Branched Chain Amino Acids and Tribulus.

IGF-1 (Insulin Growth Factor-1) is a compound produced primarily in the liver through a conversion of HGH (Human Growth Hormone). HGH is secreted by the pituitary gland and is essential for growth and healthy immune system function.*
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
Caution: For adults only.

These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
Keep out of reach of children.

New day. Fresh start. Better health.
Helps support nervous system and cardiovascular health
Dietary Supplement

Methylfolate (5-MTHF) is the most biologically active form of folate in the human body. Unlike folic acid, it needs no enzymatic conversion within the body, and is therefore six times more bioavailable.
Many people suffer from a genetic disorder that prevents them from adequately converting folate into 5-MTHF. Since it does not require conversion, supplemental 5-MTHF quickly increases both blood and cellular levels of this critical nutrient. 
In addition to its well-known role in supporting healthy fetal neural development, 5-MTHF is important in the synthesis of acetylcholine, an important neurotransmitter. 5-MTHF also supports a healthy cardiovascular system by helping to keep homocysteine levels within the normal range. Homocysteine is a known risk factor for cardiovascular disease.
Quality & potency guaranteed

CONTAINS NO artificial colors, flavors or preservatives; no wheat, gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, crustacean shellfish or fish.

This water soluble vitamin is key to maintaining healthy nerve and red blood cells, thereby supporting a healthy cardiovascular system, DNA formation and mental function. Vegetarians, seniors, and those who have undergone gastric surgery tend to lack vitamin B-12, however many may benefit. Naturally raspberry-flavored B-12 1,000 mcg Lozenges provide a flavorful alternative to your daily supplement.
Due to variations in nature, the natural color of this product may be slightly different with each batch; however, the quality specifications remain the same.

statements.notes: As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body's natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies chronic lack of sleep. Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing. This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol (from birch tree) and sorbitol, two low calorie and natural sweeteners.
Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications

Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a health care practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this product.
Not intended for use by children under age 18.

statements.notes: Dietary Supplement
Coenzymated B-12

The benefits of Coenzymated Vitamins
In order for vitamins to be utilized by the body, they must first be converted into their active coenzyme forms. Coenzymated B-12 is ready to go to work immediately. Dibencozide is another name for adenosylcobalamin, a primary coenzyme form of vitamin B-12 essential for processing branched chain amino acids for energy production in the mitochondria. Vitamin B-12 is also necessary for the production of red blood cells that deliver oxygen to tissues for energy production. Supplementation with vitamin B-12 can help ensure optimal energy production during prolonged exertion. Coenzyme supplementation reduces the body's need to synthesize the active forms of vitamin B-12, unlike the commonly used cyanocobalamin, which the body must convert to the coenzyme forms.
Suggested Use: 1 lozenge daily between meals or 30 minutes before workouts. For best results, allow to dissolve in the mouth before swallowing.

statements.notes: As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body’s natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies chronic lack of sleep.
Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing. This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol (from birch tree) and sorbitol, two low calorie and natural sweeteners.
Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant or nursing.

Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a health care practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not operate machinery while taking this product.
Not intended for use by children under age 18.
We guarantee our supplements for potency and purity
To report a serious adverse event, call 1-888-710-0006
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Promotes rest and relaxation
Dietary Supplement
Double verified gluten free

Suitable for vegans.
Keep out of reach of children.

Methylcobalamin is considered the active form of vitamin B12 and may be better absorbed than other forms.

A water-soluble vitamin, B12 is essential for proper energy metabolism, nerve and mental function, red blood cell formation and cardiovascular health. fullName: Melatonin 1 mg Lozenge Natural Peppermint Flavor

userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

contacts.text: To report a serious adverse event, call

statements.notes: As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body's natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies chronic lack of sleep. Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing. This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol (from birch tree) and sorbitol, two low calorie and natural sweeteners.
Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant or nursing.

Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a health care practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this product.
Not intended for use by children under age 18.
WE GUARANTEE OUR SUPPLEMENTS FOR POTENCY AND PURITY
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Promotes Rest and Relaxation
Dietary Supplement

contactDetails.name: Hurd Dynamics LLC, DBA Natural Nutra

statements.notes: Contains no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives; no wheat, gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, crustacean shellfish or fish.
Suitable for vegans.

As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body's natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies chronic lack of sleep. Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing. This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol and sorbitol, two low calorie and natural sweeteners.
Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant or nursing.

Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a healthcare practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this product.
Not intended for use by children under age 18.
Purity + potency guaranteed
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Promotes rest and relaxation
Vegan
Gluten free
Dietary Supplement
Suggested Use: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge on an empty stomach 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime.
Keep out of reach of children.
To report a serious adverse event, call 1-888-710-0006

statements.notes: Contains no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives; no wheat, gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, crustacean shellfish or fish.
Suitable for vegans.

Methylcobalamin is considered the active form of vitamin B12 and may be better absorbed than other forms. A water-soluble vitamin, B12 is essential for proper energy metabolism, nerve and mental function, red blood cell formation and cardiovascular health.
It is important for everyone, but especially for vegans vegetarians and seniors who tend to be lacking in B12.
Our Methyl B12 1,000 mcg Lozenges provide this superb form in a tasty berry flavored lozenge.
Purity + potency guaranteed
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

statements.notes: Tasty peppermint lozenge for occasional sleep support

As a naturally-occurring hormone, Melatonin is involved in setting our body’s natural physiologic cycles. It assists the body to normalize sleep disruption, thereby helping alleviate the fatigue that often accompanies occasional lack of sleep.
Our high quality source in a 1 mg dose offers flexibility in dosing. This natural peppermint-flavored lozenge uses xylitol and sorbitol, two low calorie sweeteners.
Caution: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Use only at bedtime.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant or nursing.

Regular dosage for individuals of any age should be limited to two weeks; do not exceed 3 mg in any 24 hour period. If less than 40 years old, do not use regularly for any purpose except on advice of a healthcare practitioner. If you have diabetes, an autoimmune, endocrine, depressive, or seizure disorder, consult your health care practitioner before use. Do not operate machinery while taking this product.
Not intended for use by children under age 18.
Store in a cool, dry place.
We guarantee our supplements for potency and purity
To report a serious adverse event, call 1-888-710-0006
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Promotes rest and relaxation
GF Gluten free
Dietary Supplement
Suggested Use: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge on an empty stomach 30 to 60 minutes before bedtime.
Contains no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives; no wheat, gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, crustacean shellfish or fish.
Keep out of reach of children.

statements.notes:
Methyl form of B-12 for optimal utilization
Methylcobalamin is considered the active form of vitamin B12 and may be better utilized than other forms.
A water-soluble vitamin, B12 is essential for proper energy metabolism, nerve and mental function, red blood cell formation and cardiovascular health.
Our Methyl B12 1,000 mcg Lozenges provide this superior form in a convenient, tasty, berry flavored lozenge.
Contains no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives; no wheat, gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, crustacean shellfish or fish.

statements.notes: Dietary Supplement
P-5-P (pyridoxal-5-phosphate)

The benefits of coenzymated vitamins
In order for vitamins to be utilized by the body, they must first be converted into their active coenzyme forms. This Coenzymated B-6 goes directly into your bloodstream in its active form, ready to go to work immediately. This avoids the loss that may occur not only during digestion, but during the liver's conversion process as well. Pyridoxal-5 Phosphate (PLP or P-5-P) is the main metabolically active coenzyme form of vitamin B-6. It is primarily in the liver that P-5-P is synthesized from pyridoxine, with the help of enzymes that require B-2, zinc and magnesium for their activity.  P-5-P is associated with numerous enzymes, many of which are involved in the conversion of amino acids into the neurotransmitters dopamine, norepinephrine and serotonin. P-5-P is also required for the synthesis of the hemoglobin molecule.
Suggested Use: 1 lozenge daily. For best results, allow to dissolve in the mouth before swallowing.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Do not use if pregnant or nursing. Consult a physician or licensed qualified health care professional before using this product if you have, or have a family history of, prostate cancer, prostate enlargement, heart disease, low "good" cholesterol (HDL), or if you are using any other dietary supplement, prescription drug, or over-the-counter drug.

Do not exceed recommended serving. Exceeding recommended serving may cause serious adverse health effects. Possible side effects include acne, hair loss, hair growth on the face (in women), aggressiveness, irritability, and increased levels of estrogen. Discontinue use and call a physician or licensed qualified health care professional immediately if you experience rapid heartbeat, dizziness, blurred vision, or other similar symptoms.

Directions: 1 lozenge up to 5 times daily. Do not exceed 50 mg per day. Do not take for more than 30 days without the advice of your physician, and have your blood hormone (estrogen, testosterone, DHEA) levels regularly assessed by your physician. Using pregnenolone may elevate your DHEA levels, and DHEA can increase estrogen and testosterone levels. Read entire label before using.

Do not exceed 50 mg per day. Do not take for more than 30 days without the advice of your physician, and have your blood hormone (estrogen, testosterone, DHEA) levels regularly assessed by your physician.

statements.notes: Suggested use: Take one (1) lozenge per day. Allow lozenge to dissolve completely by swirling around mouth before swallowing. For additional oral care support, a second lozenge can be taken, or as directed by your healthcare practitioner.

TrueOC contains BLIS K12 and BLIS M18 which are two strains of the naturally occurring probiotic organism Streptococcus salivarius. Orange flavor.
When taken regularly, these specific probiotic strains may help support several aspects of tooth and gum health and protect against the overgrowth of bacteria that causes bad breath. In addition, BLIS K12 and BLIS M18 help support upper respiratory, ear and throat health.
ACTIValoe aloe vera provides additional support for tooth and gum health.
